10 Regulated Sectors

Ten regulated sectors. One operating standard.

Government & Defence

Facilities management cleaning for federal and state government buildings, secure sites and defence installations.

View →

Local Government & Councils

Compliant cleaning programs for council chambers, community facilities and public-facing municipal buildings.

View →

Industrial & Power Station

High-hazard industrial cleaning for power stations, refineries and manufacturing plants with OHS compliance.

View →

Education & TAFE

Safe, consistent cleaning across schools, universities and TAFE campuses meeting education sector duty-of-care requirements.

View →

Commercial Office Towers

Precision commercial cleaning for CBD towers and corporate precincts, aligned to tenancy and base building obligations.

View →

Carbon Neutral Cleaning

Carbon neutral certified cleaning programs. Scope 3 emissions accounted, verified annually, not self-declared.

View →

ISO Cleaning Provider

ISO 9001 / 14001 / 45001 certified operations with documented quality management audited by JAS-ANZ accredited bodies.

View →

National Operations

Consistent service delivery across QLD, NSW, VIC, WA and SA. One provider, one standard, national coverage.

View →

Technology & Robotics

Robotic floor care, IoT consumable monitoring and digital reporting integrated into standard cleaning programs.

View →

Modern Slavery & Ethical Supply

Annual Modern Slavery Act reporting, ethical supply chain documentation and social procurement commitments.

View →

Why CPC

Compliance isn't a feature.
It's the foundation.

Procurement officers in regulated sectors aren't buying cleaning. They're buying certainty. Certainty that the provider is audited, insured, ethical and capable of operating within their compliance framework without adding risk.

View our credentials →

Triple ISO Certified

ISO 9001, 14001 and 45001: all three standards, audited annually by JAS-ANZ accredited bodies. One of very few commercial cleaning providers in Australia to hold all three simultaneously.

Carbon Neutral Certified

Carbon neutral certified through carbonneutral.com.au. Scope 1, 2 and 3 emissions measured, offset and renewed annually for every site CPC services. Not a pledge. A verified fact.

30 Years in Regulated Environments

Founded 1995. Continuous, unbroken operation across government, defence, industrial and education sectors. Longevity in regulated environments is not common. We have the history.

Modern Slavery Act Compliant

Annual reporting obligation met and documented. Supply chain ethics audited. A mandatory requirement for government and large-corporate procurement. We have the paperwork ready.

Beyond Cleaning

Most providers clean buildings.
CPC helps you run
smarter assets.

CPC's technology platform delivers compliance visibility, ESG intelligence and carbon reporting to every level of your organisation: from the facilities manager on the ground to the board reporting to investors.

Most cleaning companies only solve for the Facilities Manager.
CPC solves for the entire organisation.

See the Client Portal → Technology overview

AI-Driven Client Portal

Real-time cleaning status, audit scores, compliance tracking and incident reporting. Accessible 24/7 by facilities managers, asset managers and procurement teams across every site.

Waste & ESG Reporting

Site-level waste volumes, diversion rates and contamination insights. Monthly ESG dashboards that turn waste into a measurable, reportable KPI. Not an afterthought.

Carbon Intelligence

Carbon footprint tracked per site. Carbon Neutral Cleaning Certificates issued with verified offsets. Documented, auditable sustainability outcomes that support Net Zero reporting.

Portfolio Benchmarking

Cross-site performance comparison, efficiency opportunities and strategic insights. Data that lets procurement teams demonstrate innovation and leadership, not just cost management.

Real-time

Compliance visibility across every site

Monthly

ESG and waste dashboards per asset

Board-ready

Carbon data and sustainability certificates

Proven in the Field

Intelligence for Procurement Officers

Knowledge Hub

30 articles across 6 clusters, written for facility managers and procurement teams, not general audiences.

All 30 articles →
Government 8 min

How Government Cleaning Differs from Office Cleaning

Government facilities carry compliance obligations that standard commercial cleaning contracts do not address: procurement frameworks, security clearances, WHS Act duties and audit trails.

Read article →
Procurement 7 min

The Difference Between Cheap and Compliant Cleaning

Low-price cleaning tenders hide downstream costs: failed audits, uninsured incidents, Modern Slavery Act exposure. What compliant procurement actually looks like on paper.

Read article →
Carbon Neutral 6 min

What Is Carbon Neutral Cleaning?

A plain-language explanation of what carbon neutral cleaning means, what carbon neutral certification requires, and how to distinguish verified programs from marketing claims.

Read article →

Tell us about your sector and sites. We'll design a compliance-driven cleaning program around your obligations and schedule.
